title: Gracidea Flower Decoration
description: This datapack adds a functional Gracidea Flower Block that allows you to alter Shaymin's form!
body:
## Gracidea-Flower! 🌸
This Datapack adds decorational Gracidea Flowers that you can place in your world. This pack may be updated with more Decorations, as owned by [Cobblemon Nebula](https://discord.gg/8uNHpznENG), and made by myself, PuffHM. This datapack is inspired by Pokemon & Cobblemon alike.


### ⬇️ How to Install:
After downloading, add the .zip file to both the datapacks folder & your resourcepacks folder.

### Obtainability 🔔

To give yourself a Gracidea Flower, run the following command:
`give @p nebuladecorations:gracidea_flower 1`
These do not spawn naturally.

### Potential Datapack Editing Required for Form Change 🛠️

Depending on what you use for changing your Shaymin's form, you may need to alter the aspect in the Datapack. For now, this is `gracidea_forme=sky`, which you can easily change to anything else that you use!
The Shaymin must also be in the First Slot of your party only.

### Notes 📝

Please note that this Datapack does *not* include Shaymin Formes, but only introduces a functionality *for* the forme change & a decorational block.
